title: scutellaria rupestris subsp. cephalonica
intro: Scutellaria rupestris subsp. cephalonica, also known as Cephaleuros or Greek skullcap, is a subspecies of the Scutellaria rupestris plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, Scutellaria rupestris subsp. cephalonica has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Scutellaria rupestris subsp. cephalonica is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
